reviews.author: Remington Davis
reviews.text: Great experience for breakfast this morning! The staff was incredibly welcoming and kind, and the food was amazing. Definitely recommend and will be back.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman sarapan yang luar biasa pagi ini! Stafnya sangat ramah dan baik, dan makanannya luar biasa. Pasti saya rekomendasikan dan akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Stacey Keo
reviews.text: Awesome experience! Delicious drinks, food and friend staff. Soup was especially great on a rainy day.
reviews.textTranslated: Pengalaman yang luar biasa! Minuman dan makanannya lezat, serta stafnya ramah. Supnya sangat nikmat di hari hujan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you enjoyed everything. Rainy day weather is soupy weather! Thanks for coming by!

reviews.author: Silas Zelny
reviews.text: LOVE getting lunch here! I've had the Bahn Mi with bbq pork and the Jok with chicken pictured. I've had the thai tea every time, it's so yummy I haven't tried anything else on the menu yet 😋 my family is from Thailand so it's extra nice having a thai cafe that's hip and affordable next to work! I've been meaning to check it out for drinks after work too
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget makan siang di sini! Aku sudah coba Bahn Mi dengan daging babi BBQ dan Jok dengan ayam seperti di foto. Aku selalu pesan teh Thailand setiap kali, enak banget aku belum coba menu lainnya 😋 Keluargaku berasal dari Thailand jadi senang banget ada kafe Thailand yang trendi dan terjangkau di dekat kantor! Aku juga berencana mampir untuk minum-minum setelah kerja.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Next visit we might have to get you to branch out just a little, and you definitely need to come by after work for drinks. We will be ready.

reviews.author: Maeve Parasol
reviews.text: Great food, drinks, and atmosphere. The sunrise wrap is amazing!!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan, minuman, dan suasananya luar biasa. Sunrise wrap-nya sangat enak!!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Come back hungry, we’ve got more waiting for you.

reviews.author: Xiaodan Xu
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars treatment!

reviews.author: feifan wang
reviews.text: Thank you, we are Singaporeans and enjoyed this fun cafe’s theme and delicious food. Vietnamese coffee was great, so we’re the special coffee pork ribs and sio bak (within a fresh veggie and chillis platter). The waitress, waiters, owners were all really friendly and kind - love the vibe at this cosy place! Hope mahjong night went well - it sounds so fun!
reviews.textTranslated: Terima kasih, kami warga Singapura dan menikmati tema kafe yang menyenangkan ini serta makanan yang lezat. Kopi Vietnamnya enak sekali, begitu juga iga babi kopi spesial dan sio bak (disajikan dengan sayuran segar dan cabai). Pelayan, pramusaji, dan pemiliknya semuanya sangat ramah dan baik hati - kami menyukai suasana di tempat yang nyaman ini! Semoga malam mahjong berjalan lancar - kedengarannya sangat menyenangkan!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Our team will be happy to hear your kind words. They put a lot of heart into making everyone feel at home, so we’re glad that came through. That cozy, slightly chaotic, always-fun vibe is exactly what we're all about! Hope to see you back sometime!

reviews.author: Olivia Hernandez
reviews.text: So yummy!! The meal was so comforting and tasty. Thank you for the delicious food, great vibes and friendly welcoming folx . So glad I wandered over here to try this spot out after my massage. I’m excited to try everything else at least once. Get the buttered toast paired with the cloud, it’s like a little hug❤️
reviews.textTranslated: Enak banget!! Makanannya sangat nyaman dan lezat. Terima kasih atas makanan yang enak, suasana yang menyenangkan, dan sambutan ramah dari orang-orangnya. Senang sekali saya mampir ke sini untuk mencoba tempat ini setelah pijat. Saya bersemangat untuk mencoba semua menu lainnya setidaknya sekali. Pesan roti panggang mentega yang dipadukan dengan minuman "cloud", rasanya seperti pelukan kecil ❤️
reviews.responseFromOwner:
On a cold day, get our Jok Sapha, the rice congee....now that's a real hug!!!

Thanks for coming by and sharing the love!

reviews.author: Trevor MC
reviews.text: Wonderful owners and fantastic food
reviews.textTranslated: Pemiliknya luar biasa dan makanannya fantastis.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the review! Try our specials for an adventurous treat next time you're in!

reviews.author: Joy
reviews.text: Great food
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 5 stars! Glad you enjoy our food!

reviews.author: Aleksey Karets
reviews.text: Very authentic family run place. Absolutely delicious. Don't sleep on their drinks also, delicious and not too pricey
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat makan keluarga yang sangat otentik. Benar-benar lezat. Jangan lewatkan juga minumannya, enak dan harganya tidak terlalu mahal.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the review, Aleksey! Welcome back anytime!

reviews.author: Justine Stiftel
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the stars!!!

reviews.author: Eduardo Lopez
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks! If we aren't doing a 5 star job, please let us know!

reviews.author: Sierra White
reviews.text: I've tried the breakfast which was great, but their homemade cold brew with pandan flavouring together is my fav. I highly recommend trying this unique combination. Simple ingredients yet complex taste. Thank you Sapha!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya sudah mencoba menu sarapannya dan itu enak sekali, tetapi kopi seduh dingin buatan sendiri dengan rasa pandan adalah favorit saya. Saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk mencoba kombinasi unik ini. Bahan-bahan sederhana namun rasa yang kompleks. Terima kasih Sapha!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Since its a syrup, we can also make it a pandan latte. Try that on your next visit! See you back soon!

reviews.author: Leticia Cortes
reviews.text: I love this place! It has comfy seating, great food, and even better service! The Thai coffee drink is so good. Everyone is so friendly and I always feel welcomed. The space is just so beautiful too.
reviews.textTranslated: Aku suka tempat ini! Tempat duduknya nyaman, makanannya enak, dan pelayanannya lebih baik lagi! Minuman kopi Thailandnya enak banget. Semua orang ramah dan aku selalu merasa diterima. Tempatnya juga sangat indah.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Comfy seats, strong Thai coffee, warm welcomes… So glad you feel at home here!

5/5 across the board? We’ll keep earning it every time you walk through the doors!!!

reviews.author: Ally Grubbs
reviews.text: Super friendly service in addition to delicious and affordable food and drinks!
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan yang sangat ramah ditambah dengan makanan dan minuman yang lezat dan terjangkau!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hey there! Thanks for the stars!!!

reviews.author: Eamonn Wilson
reviews.text: Delicious Thai comfort food, cozy retro vibe, friendly owner & staff
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan Thailand yang lezat dan nyaman, suasana retro yang hangat, pemilik & staf yang ramah.
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’d love to have you back soon to try more dishes!

reviews.author: Reed Davis
reviews.text: I ordered the bak kut teh (Malaysian herbal pork stew) and a roasted corn coffee. Very reasonable prices and delicious. This kind of food is authentic and not easy to find. Husband and wife are so lovely! Would definitely come back again to try the other dishes
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan bak kut teh (semur babi herbal Malaysia) dan kopi jagung bakar. Harganya sangat terjangkau dan rasanya enak. Makanan seperti ini otentik dan tidak mudah ditemukan. Suami dan istrinya sangat ramah! Pasti akan kembali lagi untuk mencoba hidangan lainnya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: It was a pleasure having you, and thank you for the kind words about us as well. We can’t wait to welcome you back and have you try more dishes next time!

reviews.author: R H
reviews.responseFromOwner: This review is not based on an actual visit. The reviewer did not dine with us on January 30, and there was no 30-minute wait. While we were not running a public fundraiser that day, a donation was made to an organization supporting Southeast Asian deportees. We remain committed to our community while operating within the realities of a small business.

reviews.author: Natalie Phan
reviews.text: Excellent service. Food and coffee are good. We ordered the chicken congee, Hainan chicken, and the chicken sandwich/banh mi
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan sangat baik. Makanan dan kopinya enak. Kami memesan bubur ayam, ayam Hainan, dan roti lapis ayam/banh mi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for choosing us today! Hope to see you back here again soon!

reviews.author: Sunny Snell
reviews.text: The aesthetic of the store and menu is so well done. The food is also incredible-some of the flakiest and most delicious roti I have had.
reviews.textTranslated: Estetika toko dan menunya sangat bagus. Makanannya juga luar biasa—roti yang paling renyah dan lezat yang pernah saya makan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for giving us a try! Hopefully we'll see you back soon!

reviews.author: Mark Salazar
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the high five!

reviews.author: Simone C
reviews.text: Super cute spot with great service and bomb food! The wrap was amazing, highly recommend
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang super imut dengan pelayanan yang luar biasa dan makanan yang luar biasa! Wrap-nya luar biasa, sangat direkomendasikan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hey! Thanks for trying out Sapha Kafae and our Sukhumvit Sunrise Wrap! Hope to see you back in Sacramento soon!

reviews.author: Tewodros Tsegaye
reviews.text: Very cozy place. The great is good excellent service, and the coffee is even better.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya nyaman banget. Pelayanannya bagus banget, dan kopinya juga enak banget.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for coming by today! Try our Gai Yang Heatwave next time...it's a whole grilled chicken! Glad you enjoyed the coffee!!!

reviews.author: Sheldon Booster President
reviews.text: Sheldon High School Instrumental Music Program thanks Sapha Kafae for their generous donation of delicious skewers. The band students were truly grateful and the band parents had fun grilling the skewers. Thank you, Sapha Kafae, for supporting local performing arts!
reviews.textTranslated: Program Musik Instrumental Sekolah Menengah Atas Sheldon berterima kasih kepada Sapha Kafae atas donasi sate lezat mereka. Para siswa band sangat berterima kasih, dan para orang tua band senang memanggang sate tersebut. Terima kasih, Sapha Kafae, atas dukungannya terhadap seni pertunjukan lokal!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Keep making music and inspiring others — we’ll be cheering you on! 💛

reviews.author: Henry Mckay
reviews.text: Great food and service!
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan dan pelayanannya luar biasa!
reviews.responseFromOwner: See you back here soon! Thanks for coming by!

reviews.author: Brittany Warren
reviews.text: If I were a local, this would become a go-to staple for me. The service was great and kindly. Ordered the Kai Gata and Kopitiam Breakfast and they were both the perfect comfort food breakfast. Not too heavy but filling. Could not rave about it enough. 10/10 if I am back on Sacramento!
reviews.textTranslated: Kalau saya orang lokal, ini pasti jadi langganan saya. Pelayanannya hebat dan ramah. Saya memesan Kai Gata dan Kopitiam Breakfast, dan keduanya benar-benar sarapan yang sempurna. Tidak terlalu berat tapi mengenyangkan. Rasanya sungguh luar biasa. 10/10 kalau saya ke Sacramento lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Glad you're into runny eggs! See you back here soon in the capitol city!

reviews.author: Travis Warren
reviews.text: Delicious food served by a very kind staff. Highly recommend checking this out
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan lezat disajikan oleh staf yang sangat ramah. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk dicoba.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for coming by! We happen to think the low ceilings here make it kind of hard to hear, but hey! If you think its quiet in here, we will too! :)

reviews.author: Sam Abbott
reviews.text: Cute, delicious and made with intention. So many things in the menu and I'm hoping to explore this menu more often.
reviews.textTranslated: Lucu, lezat, dan dibuat dengan penuh makna. Banyak sekali menunya, dan saya berharap bisa mencoba menu ini lebih sering.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Sam. The menu is has something for everyone! Come on over for the wintery noodle soup specials we plan on rolling out soon :)

reviews.author: Pax C
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the 1-2-3-4-5 stars!

reviews.author: Nina Sreshta
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for coming by and leaving us a glowing 5 star review!

reviews.author: Foodie Girl
reviews.text: Soo good and cute and cozy! Would (and will) be back in a heartbeat. My only request would be a few more vegetarian options, I know it’s not traditional but just a personal request 😅 but for the few vegetarian options they have, they’re soooo good! Don’t leave without trying the Kaya butter toast.
reviews.textTranslated: Enak banget, imut, dan nyaman! Pasti akan kembali lagi. Satu-satunya permintaan saya adalah beberapa pilihan vegetarian lagi, saya tahu itu bukan menu tradisional tapi hanya permintaan pribadi 😅 tapi untuk beberapa pilihan vegetarian yang mereka punya, rasanya enak banget! Jangan pergi tanpa mencoba roti panggang mentega Kaya.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Vegetarian/Vegan additions are coming right up~!

reviews.author: Christy Tonel
reviews.responseFromOwner: See you back here soon! Lookout for the community events happening here soon....like....Yoga!

reviews.author: Brian Espinoza
reviews.responseFromOwner: 5 star and no words means we're doing something right, yes?

reviews.author: MJ
reviews.text: Tried the sunrise wrap and a thai green tea. Both were absolutely delicious. The service was very friendly and the staff all seemed really excited to be there and willing to answer questions about the menu items. The interior is also super cute and created a great ambiance. I just moved to the neighborhood and there’s several things on the menu I’d like to try so I’ll definitely be back
reviews.textTranslated: Saya mencoba Sunrise Wrap dan Thai Green Tea. Keduanya benar-benar lezat. Pelayanannya sangat ramah dan semua staf tampak sangat antusias dan bersedia menjawab pertanyaan tentang menu. Interiornya juga sangat lucu dan menciptakan suasana yang menyenangkan. Saya baru saja pindah ke lingkungan ini dan ada beberapa menu yang ingin saya coba, jadi saya pasti akan kembali lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hi Neighbor! We're here for you when you're ready to try something different!

reviews.author: Saya Watanabe
reviews.text: One of my favorite places in all of Sacramento. The skewers are so good and the black thai is such a unique flavor!! Will keep coming back for sure
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu tempat favorit saya di seluruh Sacramento. Sate-satenya sangat enak dan black thai-nya memiliki cita rasa yang unik!! Pasti akan terus kembali lagi.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Welcome anytime!

reviews.author: Grace Austermiller
reviews.text:
I went here a few days ago and had such an amazing experience! The food was SO so good. I got the Hainan Hustle and a Thai tea- both 10/10, so delicious.
In addition, the service was excellent! Felt so welcomed and comfortable. Definitely plan on going back.😁
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya ke sini beberapa hari yang lalu dan mendapatkan pengalaman yang luar biasa! Makanannya SANGAT enak. Saya memesan Hainan Hustle dan teh Thailand - keduanya 10/10, sangat lezat.
Selain itu, pelayanannya luar biasa! Saya merasa sangat disambut dan nyaman. Pasti berencana untuk kembali lagi. 😁
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for stopping by and for sharing your experience. We’re aiming to be welcoming and somewhere you can just unwind. That’s exactly the vibe we want to create. We can’t wait to see you back again soon!

reviews.author: Sunshine
reviews.text: Enjoy the Kaya toast and the drip coffee. Very nice decor and excellent customer serrice.
reviews.textTranslated: Nikmati roti panggang Kaya dan kopi tetesnya. Dekorasi sangat bagus dan pelayanan pelanggan sangat baik.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks a bunch for writing about our Kaya toast! Welcome back anytime for more!

reviews.author: Julissa Gomez
reviews.text:
So many wonderful things to say about Sapha Kafae. Entering into the cafe it instantly feels like and is a communal space to be where I see folks talking & eating over food & drink.
The beverages, both the Matcha & the Matcha Cloud on Coconut, are ones I recommend. I see the thought the owners put into the ingredients and presentation making me happy to spend any amount of money ($7 for each drink).
reviews.textTranslated:
Banyak sekali hal indah yang bisa dikatakan tentang Sapha Kafae. Saat memasuki kafe, langsung terasa seperti dan memang merupakan ruang komunal tempat orang-orang mengobrol & makan sambil menikmati makanan & minuman.
Minumannya, baik Matcha maupun Matcha Cloud on Coconut, sangat saya rekomendasikan. Saya melihat perhatian yang diberikan pemiliknya pada bahan-bahan dan penyajiannya membuat saya senang mengeluarkan uang berapa pun ($7 untuk setiap minuman).
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for the kind words. We’re glad you felt the sense of community we hope to create, and even happier you enjoyed the drinks. It means a lot to know the care we put into our ingredients and presentation came through.

reviews.author: Haley Maciel
reviews.text: It's hard to find authentic Southeast Asian food in Northern California, and Sapha Kafae did not disappoint! I have been obsessed with Milo, kaya toast, and chicken rice since first visiting Singapore 10 years ago, and though the Thai chicken rice recipe is slightly different, it absolutely satisfied that craving. The kaya toast was perfect as well! I already can't wait to go back and try more dishes.
reviews.textTranslated: Sulit menemukan makanan Asia Tenggara autentik di California Utara, dan Sapha Kafae tidak mengecewakan! Saya terobsesi dengan Milo, roti panggang kaya, dan nasi ayam sejak pertama kali mengunjungi Singapura 10 tahun yang lalu, dan meskipun resep nasi ayam Thailand sedikit berbeda, resepnya benar-benar memuaskan keinginan itu. Roti panggang kayanya juga sempurna! Saya sudah tidak sabar untuk kembali dan mencoba lebih banyak hidangan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for sharing this. It means so much to know our kaya toast and chicken rice brought back memories of your time in Singapore. Those dishes are a big part of why we opened Sapha Kafae, and it makes us so happy they resonate with you. We're trying out dinner on Thursday and Fridays from 5-8 if you get cravings in the evening :)

reviews.author: Stefan Spich
reviews.text: Great food, good atmosphere. Traditional Thai menu (vs. Americanized) with some lovely and rare offerings. I think this has to be the BEST BAHN MI on the Grid. The Hainan Hustle was also quite good. Simple, clean, really enjoyable. We will definitely be back. Super friendly owner. Cheers.
reviews.textTranslated: Makanan enak, suasana nyaman. Menu Thailand tradisional (bukan yang sudah diadaptasi ala Amerika) dengan beberapa pilihan yang lezat dan langka. Saya rasa ini adalah BAHN MI TERBAIK di Grid. Hainan Hustle-nya juga cukup enak. Sederhana, bersih, dan sangat menyenangkan. Kami pasti akan kembali. Pemiliknya sangat ramah. Terima kasih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the love! We won’t claim best banh mi on the Grid, but we’re glad our little twist hit the spot. Can’t wait to have you back!

reviews.author: John Majesko
reviews.text: Ordered a full day's birthday sampler for my wife. We started with the kaya toast, which, if you know, amazingly delicious. Then we both got brunch items. I got the Sukhimvit Sunrise Wrap. Excellent! The chili jam is the perfect accompaniment. My wife got the Kopitiam Breakfast Set. What a wonderful way to start the day. DO NOT forget to add the white pepper and soy sauce to the eggs. They push ordinary poached eggs into something you talk about all day. We got the Indochine Deli Board to have later in the day. It's a pick-n-eat banh mi board. There are good banh mis all over, but the differentiators here the pâté and the chili jam (PS: Different than the brunch chili jam but equally delicious). Definitely separates this banh mi from the crowd. Can't recommend this place enough. Exited to try more of this menu.
reviews.textTranslated: Memesan sampler ulang tahun sehari penuh untuk istri saya. Kami mulai dengan roti panggang kaya, yang, jika Anda tahu, luar biasa lezat. Kemudian kami berdua mendapat menu brunch. Saya mendapat Sukhimvit Sunrise Wrap. Luar biasa! Selai cabai adalah pelengkap yang sempurna. Istri saya mendapat Kopitiam Breakfast Set. Cara yang luar biasa untuk memulai hari. JANGAN lupa untuk menambahkan lada putih dan kecap ke telur. Mereka mengubah telur rebus biasa menjadi sesuatu yang Anda bicarakan sepanjang hari. Kami mendapat Indochine Deli Board untuk dimakan nanti di hari itu. Itu adalah papan banh mi pilih-dan-makan. Ada banh mi yang enak di mana-mana, tetapi pembeda di sini adalah pâté dan selai cabai (PS: Berbeda dari selai cabai brunch tetapi sama-sama lezat). Benar-benar membedakan banh mi ini dari yang lain. Tidak bisa cukup merekomendasikan tempat ini. Bersemangat untuk mencoba lebih banyak menu ini.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for celebrating her bday with us! We’re so glad you spoiled her with the kaya toast, breakfast set, and deli board — and extra love for noticing the chili jams and little touches. Can’t wait to have you back to try more...maybe next time dine in?

reviews.author: Kuro Mao
reviews.responseFromOwner: A wordless review, but the message is loud and clear. Thank you for the love!

reviews.author: David Salyer
reviews.responseFromOwner: Five stars without a word… just like a perfect record with no skips. Thanks for making our day!

reviews.author: Cherry Ng
reviews.text: Kai gata had perfectly cooked sunny-side up eggs and tasty meats on top. The Oliang coffee was a really nice sweet treat.
reviews.textTranslated: Kai gata berisi telur mata sapi yang dimasak sempurna dan daging yang lezat di atasnya. Kopi Oliang adalah suguhan manis yang sangat enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Hit the spot? I think so! Welcome back anytime!!! Cheers!

reviews.author: Steven
reviews.text: I don't write a lot of reviews, but I do love food. This place has a unique style of breakfast which is fantastic. If you want something fresh,  tasty, and inexpensive this is a great place to go.  Even the ice coffees are worth a try.  I liked it so much, I'm going back again this week....
reviews.textTranslated: Saya jarang menulis ulasan, tetapi saya sangat menyukai makanan. Tempat ini memiliki gaya sarapan yang unik dan fantastis. Jika Anda menginginkan sesuatu yang segar, enak, dan murah, ini adalah tempat yang tepat untuk dikunjungi. Bahkan es kopinya pun patut dicoba. Saya sangat menyukainya, saya akan kembali lagi minggu ini....
reviews.responseFromOwner: We’re honored you took the time to leave a review!

reviews.author: Andy
reviews.text: Tim and his family are awesome! The employees there are so welcoming and friendly they create a great atmosphere and great tea! They have fun stickers too! Best cafe in town!
reviews.textTranslated: Tim dan keluarganya luar biasa! Para karyawan di sana sangat ramah dan bersahabat, mereka menciptakan suasana yang menyenangkan dan teh yang enak! Mereka juga punya stiker-stiker yang lucu! Kafe terbaik di kota!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks Andy! Welcome in anytime!

reviews.author: Krishelle Hardson-Hurley
reviews.text: I enjoyed an amazing hot Milo and the chicken and rice dish. It was delicious! Vibes are super chill, stayed to work and chatted with the friendly owners. Great service, food and vibes!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menikmati Milo panas yang luar biasa dan hidangan ayam dan nasi. Rasanya enak sekali! Suasananya sangat santai, saya tetap tinggal untuk bekerja dan mengobrol dengan pemilik yang ramah. Pelayanan, makanan, dan suasananya luar biasa!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you so much for the love! We’re so glad you enjoyed the hot Milo and chicken & rice. Always happy to have folks hang out, get some work done, and chat. Hope to see you again soon for more yummy work time!

reviews.author: Sengdara Mata
reviews.text: Super cute brunch spot.  I love love the Southeast Asian Street menu.  The place is super cute for social media.  I love that they are dog friendly cute little outdoor patio for brunch time with the pups.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat brunch yang super imut. Saya sangat suka menu makanan jalanan Asia Tenggara. Tempatnya sangat lucu untuk diunggah di media sosial. Saya suka karena mereka ramah terhadap anjing, teras luar ruangan kecil yang lucu untuk menikmati brunch bersama anjing peliharaan.
reviews.responseFromOwner: You just described our dream brunch— grub, funky grooves, and doggos!!! We’re all about those sabai vibes on the patio. Come get more of the street food selections soon!

reviews.author: Katie Hatch
reviews.text: The coffee ribs and the pork sandwich were both delicious. Friendly helpful staff. Will be back!
reviews.textTranslated: Iga bakar kopi dan sandwich daging babi panggangnya sama-sama enak. Stafnya ramah dan membantu. Pasti akan kembali lagi!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks so much! The coffee ribs are definitely the way to go—we’re glad you loved them (and the pork sandwich too!). Hope to see you again real soon!

reviews.author: Alison M C
reviews.text: Delicious breakfast of soft boiled eggs (runny + yummy) with strong coffee and roti + condensed milk for a sweet treat. I worked here w my coworking group. Strong WiFi and friendly owners made it a comfortable place to work from. Tim & Gift are so welcoming. Later I had a Thai tea with espresso. When I lived in Thailand for 5 years, I used to drink this at a café in BangNa. It was called an "owl" นกฮูก bc it will make your eyes open wide 🦉. Great drink and perfect for a workday to stay awake and alert. The table next to me got the the nam phrik noom sampler platter and it looked incredible --lots of colorful veggies, meats and chile dip. I'll definitely be back to try it soon. Sacramento is lucky to have an authentic SE Asian café with this menu. I hope more people can be adventurous and give it a try soon!
reviews.textTranslated: Sarapan lezat berupa telur rebus setengah matang (lembut dan enak) dengan kopi kental dan roti + susu kental manis sebagai hidangan penutup. Saya bekerja di sini bersama kelompok kerja saya. WiFi yang kuat dan pemilik yang ramah membuat tempat ini nyaman untuk bekerja. Tim & Gift sangat ramah. Kemudian saya memesan teh Thailand dengan espresso. Saat tinggal di Thailand selama 5 tahun, saya biasa minum ini di sebuah kafe di BangNa. Minuman ini disebut "owl" (นกฮูก) karena bisa membuat mata terbuka lebar 🦉. Minuman yang enak dan sempurna untuk hari kerja agar tetap terjaga dan waspada. Meja di sebelah saya memesan piring sampler nam phrik noom dan terlihat luar biasa -- banyak sayuran warna-warni, daging, dan saus cabai. Saya pasti akan kembali untuk mencobanya segera. Sacramento beruntung memiliki kafe Asia Tenggara otentik dengan menu ini. Saya harap lebih banyak orang bisa berani mencoba dan mencicipinya segera!
reviews.responseFromOwner:
This is such an awesome review...thank you for taking the time to do so on Google! Love that you dug into the classic runny egg + coffee combo like a true pro. And yes, the “owl” นกฮูก! We might just have to start calling it that on the menu. We can tell the neighbor across the way we named it after him. His name is Albert...or as I like to remember "Owl-bird"

We can’t wait to see you back for the wifi (and the food of course) 
Thanks for spreading the word and helping keep Sacramento curious and hungry.

reviews.author: Lillian
reviews.text:
I popped in for lunch. So glad, I did. Awesome new eatery with a fresh take on South East Asian cuisine. Street food with a modern flair. Reasonable pricing for the location. Husband and wife team owned and operated. Friendly service. Comfortable, cozy dining room.

The eatery is located on the corner of 10th and O Street. Sapha Kafae has been in business for about a month now. The decor is funky, modern. It is left from the previous tenants, but totally works with the current theme.

It is counter service with the orders brought out to the table. I ordered the Hainan Hustle $14.50. It was fantastic. No scamming here. Real deal perfectly poached chicken. The chicken was  moist, flavorful,  and fork tender. Literally I was able to cut it with my fork. They do cut it in slices, but I further cut mine into smaller pieces. The garlic rice was fluffy and not at all overpowering garlicky. Very subtle. Yum. The clear chicken broth was superb. Mmm. Delicious.  The dipping sauce was phenomenal, a flavor explosion. The cucumber slices were large and cut with rounded ridges which elevated the presentation. Actually the entire plate presentation was thoughtfully arranged.

The menu is innovative, a fusion of modern Thai street vendor food. I am eager to come back and try other items. They serve coffee drinks as well.
reviews.textTranslated:
Saya mampir untuk makan siang. Senang sekali saya melakukannya. Restoran baru yang luar biasa dengan sentuhan segar pada masakan Asia Tenggara. Makanan jalanan dengan sentuhan modern. Harga yang wajar untuk lokasinya. Dimiliki dan dioperasikan oleh pasangan suami istri. Pelayanan ramah. Ruang makan yang nyaman dan hangat.

Restoran ini terletak di sudut Jalan 10 dan Jalan O. Sapha Kafae telah beroperasi sekitar satu bulan. Dekorasinya unik dan modern. Dekorasi tersebut merupakan peninggalan penyewa sebelumnya, tetapi sangat cocok dengan tema saat ini.

Pelayanannya menggunakan sistem pesan di konter, pesanan akan diantar ke meja. Saya memesan Hainan Hustle seharga $14,50. Rasanya fantastis. Tidak ada penipuan di sini. Ayam rebus yang benar-benar sempurna. Ayamnya lembap, beraroma, dan sangat empuk. Secara harfiah, saya bisa memotongnya dengan garpu. Mereka memang memotongnya menjadi irisan, tetapi saya memotongnya lagi menjadi potongan yang lebih kecil. Nasi bawang putihnya pulen dan sama sekali tidak terlalu beraroma bawang putih. Sangat lembut. Enak. Kaldu ayam beningnya luar biasa. Mmm. Lezat. Saus cocolannya luar biasa, ledakan rasa. Irisan mentimunnya besar dan dipotong dengan alur membulat yang meningkatkan tampilan. Sebenarnya, seluruh penyajian di piring ditata dengan sangat teliti.

Menunya inovatif, perpaduan makanan kaki lima Thailand modern. Saya ingin sekali kembali dan mencoba menu lainnya. Mereka juga menyajikan minuman kopi.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Thanks for the review! #TeamWhiteMeat 

Hope to see you back at Sapha Kafae soon!

reviews.author: Jenny Voong
reviews.responseFromOwner: A wordless review, but the message is loud and clear. Thank you for the love! Come back soon (when its not so busy) and update this to let us know how we're doing!

reviews.responseFromOwner: Try something from our menu on your next visit! Coffee Ribs are highly recommended!!!
